text_block_list.text:
This year's juniors are called the "Golden
Generation."
It's a mystery as to who coined the term.

text_block_list.name: Sharp-Eared Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it true? I hear they're all training together
today.

text_block_list.name: Intelligent Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It seems like it. Hehe... I'm looking forward to
seeing them.
Thanks for waiting, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Intelligent Reporter
text_block_list.text: They're here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I'm so happy we can all make our debut
together this year!

It's Special Week, an Umamusume always at the
center of everyone's attention. She's moved to
Tokyo from the countryside to keep a promise
she made to her mothers.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. It's always a pleasure to compete with
everyone. With that said, shall we begin our run?

Grass Wonder comes from abroad, but has the air
of a traditional Japanese lady. She may appear
gentle, but deep down, she has an iron will and
has been catching attention ever since tryouts.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oye! What's going on here?! You're not startin'
without me, are you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Feast your eyes! The all powerful Phantom Bird
has arrived! A race without El is like a taco
without salsa!

And here is El Condor Pasa. Her goal is to
become the world's strongest, and she has
captivated people since even before her debut—a
natural-born performer.

text_block_list.name: Intelligent Reporter
text_block_list.text:
They're each so wonderful. I'm at a loss as to who
I should follow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, everyone's here. Seems like a waste of time if
you ask me, but...

text_block_list.name: Sharp-Eared Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Seiun Sky is here as well. Not much is
known of this coy racer, but I'm excited to learn
more!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Um, I said excuse me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you forgetting someone here? For
instance, the star of this "Golden Generation" of
yours?

Suddenly, an Umamusume loudly announces her
entrance, demanding everyone's attention.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How could you forget me, King Halo, a true
first-rate Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For goodness' sake! How about a round of
applause? Or at least a "bravo"?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now is not the time to hold back your admiration
and praise! Come on, don't be shy!

There she is, King Halo, an Umamusume with a
strong personality who will be under my
management from now on.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I mean you too, Trainer! Don't hide your
adoration! Where's your applause?! I'm waiting!

text_block_list.name: Intelligent Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It's King Halo, the daughter of a legendary
Umamusume with countless G1 races to her name.
That said...

text_block_list.name: Sharp-Eared Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Eh... Her mother's a true legend. The daughter's
bound not to disappoint... I hope.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hellooooo?! Trainer!
choice_data_list: You know everyone's looking at you, right?
You know everyone's looking at you, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Are they? Is that why you kept silent this
entire time?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's no need to be so humble. However,
I can understand if you're intimidated by my
elegance and the attention I command.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh, King? Everyone's already finished warming up on
the track.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Let her be, Spe! It's better we start while Miss Royalty's
got everyone distracted.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! It's finally starting! The Golden
Generation's about to begin their run!
choice_data_list: You better hurry before they start!
You better hurry before they start!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?! But... I haven't even finished half of my self-introduction yet!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wait, everyone! What are you doing?! You'd
really dare try to begin without this year's star?
Whoosh!
King Halo blasts off like a rocket ship.

She bolts away from the spectators, her speed
pulling their gaze after her as she cuts toward the
track.
Fshhh...

text_block_list.name: Intelligent Reporter
text_block_list.text: She really is her daughter!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I underestimated you! Didn't think you'd
make it in time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I probably would've given up halfway and gone
fishin' or something.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. "Give up" is not a phrase I'm familiar with.
And I certainly wouldn't walk away from an easy
victory.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
When victory is on the line, I'll never give up!
That is my ethos!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, come on, Sky! Let's do another run!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm giving you the right to continue challenging me until I've won!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What the... Isn't that backwards?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Does my originality perplex you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Either way, would you expect anything less from a
first-rate, multi-talented, and praiseworthy
Umamusume such as myself?

She is extraordinarily different from others—truly
unique. Her vanity is all just part of the package.

Our journey to take on the Twinkle Series
together begins here.
